content.speakerText: The tank's about half full—did you refill it?
content.speakerTextCn: 油箱大概一半满，你加过油吗？

options.text: I didn't refill it, but I'll pay for the missing fuel.
I don't know how cars work, so I didn't check.
The tank was full when I got it, so I didn't need to.
Can you refill it for me? I'm in a hurry.

content.explanation: 正确答案表明承认未加油并主动提出补偿，符合责任担当的口语回应。选项2缺乏责任感，选项3虽合理但未回应是否加油，选项4推卸责任，不符合沟通原则。

content.speakerText: There's a small scratch on the driver's side door—did you notice that?
content.speakerTextCn: 驾驶座门上有道小划痕，你注意到了吗？

options.text: I didn't notice it when I picked it up—I checked the inspection report.
I don't care about scratches—they're just cosmetic.
Whoever drove it before must have done it.
I'll fix it myself with some toothpaste.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确区分损伤为取车前已有，并引用检查报告作为证据，是专业且安全的回应。选项2态度轻率，选项3推卸责任无依据，选项4提出荒谬解决方案，不符合实际场景。

content.speakerText: The fuel level is lower than when you rented it. What happened?
content.speakerTextCn: 油量比你租车时低了，怎么回事？

options.text: I used more fuel because I took a longer route—I'll pay the difference.
I didn't drive it at all—I left it parked.
The car must have a fuel leak—I didn't notice it.
Can you just refill it and charge me later?

content.explanation: 正确答案承认使用导致油量下降并主动承担费用，体现责任感。选项2与事实矛盾（油量下降说明使用过），选项3无证据推卸责任，选项4拖延处理，缺乏主动性。

content.template: I'd like to ___ that I filled the tank before returning.
content.hint: 用于正式说明或确认某事的动词

content.template: I noticed the scratch on the door, but it was already ___ when I picked up the car.
content.hint: 表示‘存在’或‘原本就有’的常用表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（be there 表示‘原本存在’）

content.template: Could you please ___ the damage on the passenger side? I want to make sure it's documented.
content.hint: 在还车时要求确认损伤的常用动词

content.speakerText: The tank's about half full—did you refill it?
content.speakerTextCn: 油箱大概一半满，你加过油吗？
expectedAnswers: I refilled it before returning—I made sure it was full.
I didn't refill it, but I'm happy to pay for the fuel I used.
Oops, I forgot! Can I add some money to cover the cost?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明是否加油
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确
表达自然度：符合真实对话语气，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 refill / tank / fuel 等关键词

content.speakerText: There's a small scratch on the driver's side door—did you notice that?
content.speakerTextCn: 驾驶座门上有道小划痕，你注意到了吗？
expectedAnswers: I didn't see it when I picked up the car—I checked the inspection report and it wasn't listed.
I'm sorry, that was my fault—I must have scratched it parking yesterday.
Actually, I noticed it right away and took a photo to show it was already there.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰区分新旧损伤
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态和表达（e.g., 'must have scratched'）
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合沟通情境
关键词覆盖：使用了 scratch / notice / inspection report / pick up 等关键词

content.speakerText: There's a dent on the rear bumper. Do you know how it happened?
content.speakerTextCn: 后保险杠有个凹痕，你知道是怎么造成的吗？
expectedAnswers: I'm not sure—I didn't notice it when I drove it. Could you check the rental log?
I think I hit something while parking—I apologize and will cover the repair cost.
That was already there when I got the car—I have photos from the pickup inspection.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否合理回应损伤责任问题
语言准确性：使用恰当的推测或道歉表达（e.g., 'I think', 'I apologize'）
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合服务场景沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 dent / bumper / notice / inspection / repair 等关键词
